tlx5012_init.message0:
Initialize TLx5012B angle sensor %1
CS Pin %2
tlx5012_init.tooltip: Initialize TLx5012B magnetic angle sensor using SPI interface

tlx5012_read_angle.tooltip: Read angle value from TLx5012B sensor, returns 0°~360°

tlx5012_read_speed.tooltip: Read angular speed from TLx5012B sensor

tlx5012_read_revolutions.tooltip: Read cumulative revolution count from TLx5012B sensor, range -256~256

tlx5012_read_temperature.tooltip: Read temperature from TLx5012B sensor in Celsius

tlx5012_read_angle_range.tooltip: Read angle range setting from TLx5012B sensor

tlx5012_reset.tooltip: Reset TLx5012B sensor to factory defaults
